name: rowan
tagline: Python SDK skill wrapping Rowan's cloud molecular-modeling API: pKa, docking, conformers, MSA, protein cofolding.
verdict: No malicious behavior found: no secret theft, no piped remote execution, no hidden instructions. Two real but low-severity issues for an installer to know: the flagship end-to-end example references an undefined variable (top_compound) and will crash with NameError if run as-is, and the file is 1087 lines (~2x the recommended budget), adding context cost on

highlights.summary: rotate_webhook_secret() example (lines 135-138, 780-782) invalidates the existing secret immediately with no confirmation guard shown; risky if copied into automation verbatim.
Lines 76 and 110 show `rowan.api_key = "your_api_key_here"` (hardcode-in-source) presented alongside the env-var method, which can encourage committing API keys to source control.
End-to-end example (line 1008) references `top_compound`, a variable never defined — only `top_idx` (line 994) and `top_smiles` (line 995) exist — so the snippet as written raises NameError.
